archive_size_bytes.description: Size of the image archive in bytes, useful for storage planning

creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the image was created, useful for auditing

effective_labels.description: Active labels applied to the image, useful for resource categorization

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the image resource in configurations

label_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint for tracking changes to the image's labels

self_link.description: URL for accessing the image resource via the API

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in Terraform applied to the image, useful for organization
